name: Resonate Analytics Event Processor
description: Streams Resonate analytics event envelopes from Pub/Sub into BigQuery raw, clean, fact, view, and quarantine warehouse layers.

parameters.name: inputSubscription
parameters.label: Input Pub/Sub subscription
parameters.helpText: Terraform-managed analytics Dataflow subscription resource ID.

parameters.name: deadLetterTopic
parameters.label: Dead-letter topic
parameters.helpText: Terraform-managed analytics dead-letter topic resource ID. Pub/Sub handles final dead-letter forwarding from the subscription policy.

parameters.name: outputProjectId
parameters.label: Output project ID
parameters.helpText: GCP project containing the analytics BigQuery warehouse dataset.

parameters.name: environment
parameters.label: Environment
parameters.helpText: Source environment name, such as dev, staging, or prod.

parameters.name: supportedEventVersions
parameters.label: Supported event versions
parameters.helpText: Comma-separated list of event versions promoted to clean/fact/view layers. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: dedupeWindowSeconds
parameters.label: Dedupe window seconds
parameters.helpText: Fixed window size used to dedupe Pub/Sub redeliveries by eventId before BigQuery writes. Defaults to 900.
